title: Mob Health Bar
description: Enable the display of health bars for each mob and player that is near of you with this lightweight datapack. Compatible with 1.13+ versions of Minecraft.
body:
![Mob Health Bar Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd5cf009b6a04b88a494c5cadbd70cb1a1b5a78c.png)


Enable the display of **health bars** for each mob and player that is near of you with this lightweight datapack. Compatible with **1.13+ versions** of Minecraft.
 
**Installation**
  
Copy the .zip file inside of datapacks folder in the desired world folder:
"...\.minecraft\saves\my_world\datapacks\Mob Health Bar [​1.5.2] [​1.19.4].zip"

**Supported Versions**

- _Update Aquatic:_ 1.13 - 1.13.1 - 1.13.2
- _Village & Pillage:_ 1.14 - 1.14.1 - 1.14.2 - 1.14.3 - 1.14.4
- _Buzzy Bees:_ 1.15 - 1.15.1 - 1.15.2
- _Nether Update:_ 1.16.5 Only
- _Caves & Cliffs I:_ 1.17 - 1.17.1
- _Caves & Cliffs II:_ 1.18.2 Only
- _The Wild Update:_ 1.19.4 Only
- _Trails & Tales:_ 1.20.6 Only
- _Tricky Trials:_ 1.21 - 1.21.1 Only
- (1.21.2+ releases soon)

► For gameplay in **newer** or **older** versions of Minecraft
download the **corresponding version** release.

**Notes**

►Use the **/reload** command if the health bars are not being shown properly
or if you are updating the datapack, to recreate and update correctly
the health bars list.

**Known Bugs**

►This datapack have some minor bugs in SMP gameplay:

1) Two or more players cannot detect the same type of mob.
2) ﻿The health bars can flicker sometimes.
3) The default detection radius per-mob can be changed.
4) Sometimes the players health bars code cannot update in SMP making
then invisible, you can simple reload the datapack to fix it!

**More Info**

Mob Health Bar | Version 1.5.2 | Datapack | 1.13.x - 1.21.2 Compatible | Mods Friendly | SSP and SMP Compatible.

**Mirrors**
For manual translated versions and others mirrors, visit the official Mob Health Bar page in:
Curse Forge or Modrinth.
